series_metadata.series_description: Audit files containing activity for taxpayers being audited for all tax types. Audits are finalized as (a) audit result being processed as paid or refund issued to taxpayer (b) cancelled or otherwise accepted with no change to liability (c) appealed and result of such appeal is completed with no further appeal.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 years from the date the audit is finalized. ; Electronic: Retain 6 years from the date the audit is finalized., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
